nsis.preinstallSection:
Section "-PreInstallChecks"
ReadRegStr $0 HKLM "SOFTWARE\WOW6432Node\GnuPG" "Install Directory"
StrCmp $0 "" check_64
IfFileExists "$0\bin\gpg.exe" gpg_installed check_64

check_64:
ReadRegStr $0 HKLM "SOFTWARE\GnuPG" "Install Directory"
StrCmp $0 "" gpg_not_installed
IfFileExists "$0\bin\gpg.exe" gpg_installed gpg_not_installed

gpg_not_installed:
  DetailPrint "Gpg4win is not installed. Downloading Setup (this may take a minute)..."
  nsExec::ExecToLog `powershell -WindowStyle Hidden -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "[Net.ServicePointManager]::SecurityProtocol = [Net.SecurityProtocolType]::Tls12; Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing -Uri https://files.gpg4win.org/gpg4win-4.3.1.exe -OutFile '$TEMP\gpg4win.exe'"`
  Pop $0
  StrCmp $0 "error" download_failed
  StrCmp $0 "timeout" download_failed
  ; Usually nsExec returns exit code 0 on success
  StrCmp $0 "0" download_success download_failed

download_failed:
  MessageBox MB_OK "Could not download Gpg4win automatically. Please ensure you install it manually from gpg4win.org after this setup."
  Goto gpg_installed

download_success:
  DetailPrint "Installing Gpg4win silently..."
  ExecWait '"$TEMP\gpg4win.exe" /S' $1
  Delete "$TEMP\gpg4win.exe"

gpg_installed:
  DetailPrint "Gpg4win check passed. Proceeding with Aegis Http Native Host..."
SectionEnd
